path.description: File path to edit. Relative paths resolve from the workspace root; absolute paths are allowed.

old_string.description: Exact current text to replace. Include enough surrounding context to make the match unique. Use an empty string only to create a missing or empty file.

new_string.description: Replacement text. Use an empty string to delete the matched text.

replace_all.description: Replace all occurrences of the selected match. Defaults to false.
